Hi,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I understand that you are seeking assistance with the Electronic Commercial Invoice and DPD carrier integration.

Could you please confirm the store URL or the exact name of the store so that we can check the setup from our end and assist you accordingly?

Once we have the store details, we’ll be happy to guide you further and help you with the next steps.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,
Priyanka

comments.body:
Hi,

Thank you for sharing the store details and explaining your requirement. I understand that you are currently using the PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx app and are planning to move to the PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Label app to use multiple carriers.

Regarding the PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx app, you can update the international shipping and commercial invoice details by navigating to:
App Settings → International Shipping Settings, as shown in the screenshot.

For orders that require a commercial invoice, the document will be sent electronically to FedEx automatically during label generation.

With respect to DPD integration, please note that DPD cannot be added via EasyPost in the PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx app. However, DPD can be configured using EasyPost within the PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Label app, and we’d be happy to assist you with setting this up.

To guide you through the setup and ensure everything is configured correctly, I recommend booking a call with us using the link below. We’ll be happy to walk you through the entire process and answer any questions you may have.
[Book a call]

Looking forward to assisting you further.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/ibHwkKyNvkcUUNMHEsyMHOFnt/?name=Screenshot+2025-12-30+at+9.21.29%E2%80%AFPM.png)


Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Madhup,

In the app under **Settings → General → Shipping**, the packing slip template is currently selected as **A4 Template**. This is a predefined template and does not provide an option for customization.

If you would like to edit the packing slip and add **“Packing Slip”** as a title, you will need to select the **Custom Packing Slip Template** option instead.

Please let us know if you need any assistance from our end. We will be happy to help.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

Hello Madhup,

We are pleased to inform you that the enhancement related to Bypassing the Phone Number request for label generation in the Multi Carrier app is available.

For this to work, your FedEx account need to be migrated to the Rest API integration. To do so, please follow the steps below:

Go to **App → Settings → Add Carrier → Select FedEx (Second Option) → Add Account**. Then connect your FedEx account by entering the required FedEx account details and selecting the appropriate validation type. We recommend choosing the **Invoice validation option**.

Before proceeding with the migration, please ensure the following:

- Ensure all previously generated labels have been printed.
- Ensure pickups have been requested for those shipments.
- If any labels need to be canceled, please cancel them before switching to the FedEx REST API.

If you prefer, we would be happy to schedule a call to assist with the migration and address any questions you may have. Please use the appointment link **[****CLICK HERE****]** to book a slot based on your availability. The link shows available slots for the next **48 working hours**.

Feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need any assistance.

Hello Madhup,

Good day!

Yes, the app support DPD integration via EasyPost. Please follow the steps below:

- Step 1: Sign up for an EasyPost account at easypost.com (EasyPost is a shipping carrier platform and signing up is free).
- Step 2: Connect your DPD account within EasyPost under **Carriers**.
- Step 3: Connect your EasyPost account in the app under **Settings → Carrier**, and select EasyPost.

Let us know for any further queries.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
